data.name: SPACE SEX SHOP
data.detailed_description:
You arrive at an orbital station lost among the stars 🌌. Far from familiar worlds, there are no competitors or earthly market rules here, only an empty trading module 🚀 and limitless possibilities.

At first, your store is a small compartment with a basic assortment of goods 📦. Your task is to understand the needs of your customers, from humans to alien races 👽, and gradually develop your business. Every decision matters: what goods to buy, how to organize the space, who to hire for the team 🤖 to ensure impeccable service.

With each successful step, your station grows, new technologies appear, sales floors expand, and opportunities open up for the introduction of unique products ✨. Over time, your modest store turns into the center of the galactic entertainment industry, where reputation and strategy determine your place among the stars🪐.

🌟 Game features:

📦 Assortment and development — expand your product line, open new categories, and implement technologies of the future.

🚀 Business growth — improve your station, expand your halls, and create unique upgrades.

🤖 Staff — hire assistants and manage your team for effective work.

🌌 Progression — go from a small shop to an influential corporation spanning the entire galaxy.

Now space is your arena. Manage, develop, and conquer the universe of adult entertainment💫.

data.short_description: SPACE SEX SHOP is an 18+ store simulator where you have to open the first adult store in space 🚀✨. Manage your inventory, study demand among different alien races 👽🤖, develop your station, and step by step turn a small trading module into a galactic empire 👑.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2540 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2540 MB 可用空間

  • Memory: 1 MB RAM
  • Storage: 2540 MB available space
